visual_description: A woman with long dark hair, wearing a blue robe over a beige turtleneck, peeks around a white wall with her mouth open in surprise. She then covers her mouth with both hands, eyes closed, while holding a large kitchen knife. She continues to hold the knife, alternating between covering her mouth and looking at the knife with her mouth open.
